title: Dealing with ranged enemies
para1: Ranged enemies such as *imps* can be a pain.  There are a lot of ways to deal with them.
para2: You could close the distance with them, use something like *smoke* to prevent them from shooting, or *grapple* them and pull them close.
para3: Or you could trick them into shooting *their own allies*…

title: Animals and plants
para1: The common orange *cat* is a frequent visitor to the dungeon.
para2: Legend has it that these creatures can be powerful allies if treated well.
para3: Cats sometimes bring their *kittens* into the dungeon.

title: Levels and Perks
para1: Leveling up is done by collecting *orbs*, not by killing enemies for xp
